title: Hadith 1
excerpt: Actions are only by intentions, and every person will have only what they intended.

searchText.title: Hadith 1
searchText.english: Actions are only by intentions, and every person will have only what they intended.
searchText.malay: Sesungguhnya setiap amalan itu bergantung kepada niat, dan setiap orang akan mendapat berdasarkan apa yang diniatkannya.

title: Hadith 2
excerpt: The merciful are shown mercy by the Most Merciful. Be merciful to those on earth and the One above the heavens will have mercy upon you.

searchText.title: Hadith 2
searchText.english: The merciful are shown mercy by the Most Merciful. Be merciful to those on earth and the One above the heavens will have mercy upon you.
searchText.malay: Orang yang penyayang akan disayangi oleh Yang Maha Penyayang. Sayangilah mereka di bumi, nescaya kamu akan disayangi oleh Tuhan di langit.

title: Al-Fatihah 1
excerpt: In the name of Allah, the Most Compassionate, the Most Merciful.

searchText.title: Al-Fatihah The Opening الفاتحة
searchText.english: In the name of Allah, the Most Compassionate, the Most Merciful.
searchText.malay: Dengan nama Allah Yang Maha Pemurah lagi Maha Penyayang.

title: Al-Fatihah 2
excerpt: All praise is for Allah, Lord of all worlds.

searchText.title: Al-Fatihah The Opening الفاتحة
searchText.english: All praise is for Allah, Lord of all worlds.
searchText.malay: Segala puji bagi Allah, Tuhan seluruh alam.

title: Al-Fatihah 3
excerpt: The Most Compassionate, the Most Merciful.

searchText.title: Al-Fatihah The Opening الفاتحة
searchText.english: The Most Compassionate, the Most Merciful.
searchText.malay: Yang Maha Pemurah lagi Maha Penyayang.

title: Al-Fatihah 4
excerpt: Master of the Day of Recompense.

searchText.title: Al-Fatihah The Opening الفاتحة
searchText.english: Master of the Day of Recompense.
searchText.malay: Pemilik Hari Pembalasan.

title: Al-Fatihah 5
excerpt: You alone we worship, and You alone we ask for help.

searchText.title: Al-Fatihah The Opening الفاتحة
searchText.english: You alone we worship, and You alone we ask for help.
searchText.malay: Hanya kepada-Mu kami menyembah dan hanya kepada-Mu kami memohon pertolongan.

title: Al-Fatihah 6
excerpt: Guide us to the straight path.

searchText.title: Al-Fatihah The Opening الفاتحة
searchText.english: Guide us to the straight path.
searchText.malay: Tunjukilah kami jalan yang lurus.

title: Al-Fatihah 7
excerpt: The path of those You have blessed, not of those who incur anger, nor of those who are astray.

searchText.title: Al-Fatihah The Opening الفاتحة
searchText.arabic: صِرَاطَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ الْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا الضَّالِّينَ
searchText.english: The path of those You have blessed, not of those who incur anger, nor of those who are astray.
searchText.malay: Jalan orang-orang yang telah Engkau beri nikmat, bukan jalan mereka yang dimurkai dan bukan pula mereka yang sesat.

title: Al-Ikhlas 1
excerpt: Say, He is Allah, One.

searchText.title: Al-Ikhlas Sincerity الإخلاص
searchText.english: Say, He is Allah, One.
searchText.malay: Katakanlah: Dialah Allah Yang Maha Esa.

title: Al-Ikhlas 2
excerpt: Allah, the Eternal Refuge.

searchText.title: Al-Ikhlas Sincerity الإخلاص
searchText.english: Allah, the Eternal Refuge.
searchText.malay: Allah tempat bergantung segala sesuatu.

title: Al-Ikhlas 3
excerpt: He neither begets nor is born.

searchText.title: Al-Ikhlas Sincerity الإخلاص
searchText.english: He neither begets nor is born.
searchText.malay: Dia tidak beranak dan tidak pula diperanakkan.

title: Al-Ikhlas 4
excerpt: And there is none comparable to Him.

searchText.title: Al-Ikhlas Sincerity الإخلاص
searchText.english: And there is none comparable to Him.
searchText.malay: Dan tidak ada sesuatu pun yang setara dengan-Nya.

title: Al-Falaq 1
excerpt: Say, I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak.

searchText.title: Al-Falaq The Daybreak الفلق
searchText.english: Say, I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak.
searchText.malay: Katakanlah: Aku berlindung kepada Tuhan yang menguasai subuh.

title: Al-Falaq 2
excerpt: From the evil of what He created.

searchText.title: Al-Falaq The Daybreak الفلق
searchText.english: From the evil of what He created.
searchText.malay: Daripada kejahatan makhluk yang Dia ciptakan.

title: Al-Falaq 3
excerpt: And from the evil of darkness when it settles.

searchText.title: Al-Falaq The Daybreak الفلق
searchText.english: And from the evil of darkness when it settles.
searchText.malay: Dan daripada kejahatan malam apabila telah gelap gelita.

title: Al-Falaq 4
excerpt: And from the evil of those who blow upon knots.

searchText.title: Al-Falaq The Daybreak الفلق
searchText.english: And from the evil of those who blow upon knots.
searchText.malay: Dan daripada kejahatan para peniup pada ikatan-ikatan.

title: Al-Falaq 5
excerpt: And from the evil of an envier when he envies.

searchText.title: Al-Falaq The Daybreak الفلق
searchText.english: And from the evil of an envier when he envies.
searchText.malay: Dan daripada kejahatan orang yang dengki apabila dia dengki.

title: An-Nas 1
excerpt: Say, I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind.

searchText.title: An-Nas Mankind الناس
searchText.english: Say, I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind.
searchText.malay: Katakanlah: Aku berlindung kepada Tuhan manusia.

title: An-Nas 2
excerpt: The Sovereign of mankind.

searchText.title: An-Nas Mankind الناس
searchText.english: The Sovereign of mankind.
searchText.malay: Raja manusia.

title: An-Nas 3
excerpt: The God of mankind.

searchText.title: An-Nas Mankind الناس
searchText.english: The God of mankind.
searchText.malay: Sembahan manusia.

title: An-Nas 4
excerpt: From the evil of the retreating whisperer.

searchText.title: An-Nas Mankind الناس
searchText.english: From the evil of the retreating whisperer.
searchText.malay: Daripada kejahatan pembisik yang bersembunyi.

title: An-Nas 5
excerpt: Who whispers into the hearts of mankind.

searchText.title: An-Nas Mankind الناس
searchText.english: Who whispers into the hearts of mankind.
searchText.malay: Yang membisikkan ke dalam dada manusia.

title: An-Nas 6
excerpt: From among jinn and mankind.

searchText.title: An-Nas Mankind الناس
searchText.english: From among jinn and mankind.
searchText.malay: Daripada kalangan jin dan manusia.

title: Beginning with mercy
excerpt: This opening teaches the believer to begin every meaningful action by remembering Allah and His mercy. It frames knowledge, worship, and daily life with humility and reliance.

searchText.title: Beginning with mercy
searchText.body: This opening teaches the believer to begin every meaningful action by remembering Allah and His mercy. It frames knowledge, worship, and daily life with humility and reliance.

title: Praise, mercy, and accountability
excerpt: These ayat gather the believer between gratitude, hope, and awareness of the Day of Recompense. NOOR will later support long-form tafseer entries and ayah ranges.

searchText.title: Praise, mercy, and accountability
searchText.body: These ayat gather the believer between gratitude, hope, and awareness of the Day of Recompense. NOOR will later support long-form tafseer entries and ayah ranges.

title: Worship and guidance
excerpt: The servant declares worship for Allah alone and asks for guidance. This becomes the daily heart of Muslim practice and learning.

searchText.title: Worship and guidance
searchText.body: The servant declares worship for Allah alone and asks for guidance. This becomes the daily heart of Muslim practice and learning.

title: Pure tawhid
excerpt: Surah Al-Ikhlas summarizes the oneness and uniqueness of Allah. It is short in words and immense in meaning.

searchText.title: Pure tawhid
searchText.body: Surah Al-Ikhlas summarizes the oneness and uniqueness of Allah. It is short in words and immense in meaning.

title: Seeking refuge from external harms
excerpt: Surah Al-Falaq teaches the believer to seek refuge with the Lord of daybreak from created harms, darkness, hidden harm, and envy.

searchText.title: Seeking refuge from external harms
searchText.body: Surah Al-Falaq teaches the believer to seek refuge with the Lord of daybreak from created harms, darkness, hidden harm, and envy.

title: Seeking refuge from whispers
excerpt: Surah An-Nas directs the heart to Allah as Lord, King, and God of mankind while seeking protection from whispers that affect the inner life.

searchText.title: Seeking refuge from whispers
searchText.body: Surah An-Nas directs the heart to Allah as Lord, King, and God of mankind while seeking protection from whispers that affect the inner life.
